stories.title: Fix extra_args command injection vulnerability
acceptanceCriteria: extra_args is parsed with shlex.split() and validated against a whitelist of allowed pytest flags
Disallowed flags raise ValueError and prevent execution
Allowed flags: -k, --timeout, -x, --tb, -v, -q, --co, --maxfail, -m

stories.title: Enforce SECRET_KEY and FERNET_KEY from environment
acceptanceCriteria: config.py raises ValueError on startup if SECRET_KEY is missing or set to 'change-me'
config.py raises ValueError on startup if FERNET_KEY is missing or empty
TestConfig exempt from this check
.env.example documents both keys with generation instructions

stories.title: Add run_cron_schedule Celery task for Cron trigger
acceptanceCriteria: run_cron_schedule task exists in app/tasks/execution_tasks.py or schedule_tasks.py
Task accepts schedule_id, loads CronSchedule, calls prepare_execution with TriggerType.CRON
DatabaseScheduler entries reference the task name correctly
Cron schedule with is_active=True triggers execution when beat fires

stories.title: Fix has_role string vs Role enum mismatch in templates
acceptanceCriteria: User.has_role() accepts both Role enum and string arguments
base.html admin menu correctly visible for super_admin users
All has_role() calls in templates work correctly

stories.title: Add RBAC permission check to API execution endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/v1/executions checks execution.trigger permission
Visitor-role user with API token gets 403
Tester/Project_lead/Super_admin can trigger via API

stories.title: Add rollback protection to route commits
acceptanceCriteria: All db.session.commit() calls in route handlers are wrapped in try/except
On IntegrityError or other DB error, session is rolled back before re-raising
Affected files: auth/routes.py, projects/routes.py, executions/routes.py

stories.title: Add @celery.task decorator to send_notification
acceptanceCriteria: send_notification has @celery.task decorator with bind=True, max_retries=3
Task uses self.retry() for retryable failures
Task is properly registered and callable via .delay()

stories.title: Add rate limiting to login endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: Login endpoint limits to 5 failed attempts per IP per minute
Rate limit uses Redis counter
Exceeded limit returns 429 with retry-after message
Successful login resets the counter
